items.text: We are simplifying how our technology is delivered, managed and optimized and helping customers maximize the business value of their technology investments.
items.rationale: General mission statement about simplifying technology delivery; no risk described.

items.text: Strategy and Priorities In today's digital-first world, businesses and organizations globally are deploying technology to pursue their strategic objectives, from accelerating growth to enhancing operational efficiency and fostering innovation.
items.rationale: Generic industry framing about digital transformation, not a specific risk.

items.text: Cisco is at the forefront of this evolution, developing innovative solutions that leverage advanced AI to deliver more valuable outcomes for our customers.
items.rationale: Marketing statement about AI leadership, no risk content.

items.text: Now more than ever it is crucial for businesses to remain competitive while managing resource constraints.
items.rationale: Generic cautionary framing about competitiveness, not a specific risk.

items.text: Our customers continue to focus on modernizing their infrastructure with a focus on speed, agility, productivity, innovation and energy efficien cy.
items.rationale: Describes customer priorities/trends, not a risk to the company.

items.text: These three customer priorities drive our innovation and technology, making them our priorities as well.
items.rationale: Strategic alignment statement, no risk described.

items.text: To help deliver on them, we are bringing together the power of our portfolio, which we refer to as One Cisco, which provides three key outcomes to our customers: i) AI-ready data centers, ii) future-proofed workplaces, and iii) digital resilience.
items.rationale: Describes 'One Cisco' strategy and product outcomes, promotional not risk.

items.text: AI-Ready Data Centers We are transforming data centers to power AI workloads anywhere.
items.rationale: Product/strategy description for data centers, no risk.

items.text: Whether customers need to modernize parts of their existing infrastructure or power new, massive AI workloads, Cisco brings together a wide array of infrastructure (across networking, compute, storage, and silicon) with unified management across traditional and AI workloads, and security from on-premise to cloud to power AI-ready data centers.
items.rationale: Describes infrastructure offerings, not a risk statement.

items.text: Future-Proofed Workplaces Cisco helps deliver "future-proofed" workplaces, modernizing how people and technology work and serve their customers.
items.rationale: Marketing description of workplace solutions.

items.text: This includes environments ranging from factory floors with plant workers and robots to hospitals with healthcare workers, as well as to social workers and salespeople on the move.
items.rationale: Describes customer environments, no risk.

items.text: For secure campus and branch networking, we offer a flexible range of solutions that help ensure secure, reliable connections for users and devices.
items.rationale: Product description of networking solutions.

items.text: Our smart building technology turns network devices into sensors for enhanced intelligence and control of physical spaces.
items.rationale: Product feature description, no risk.

items.text: To support productivity, we provide collaboration devices and software to enable collaboration no matter where people work.
items.rationale: Product description of collaboration tools.

items.text: Digital Resilience We help to keep the data center, workplace, and entire IT environment securely up and running in the face of any disruption.
items.rationale: General strategic statement about resilience, no specific risk.

items.text: Our network assurance capabilities, powered by ThousandEyes, are integrated throughout our portfolio.
items.rationale: Product capability description (ThousandEyes).

items.text: This technology helps ensure seamless connectivity and optimal digital experiences across cloud, Internet, and enterprise networks, for the delivery of applications and services.
items.rationale: Describes technology benefits, not a risk.

items.text: Our observability solution monitors the entire enterprise to help prevent downtime and improve experiences across networks, infrastructures, and applications.
items.rationale: Product description of observability solution.

items.text: Additionally, Cisco provides robust security measures for threat prevention, detection, investigation, and response for organizations of any size and security maturity.
items.rationale: General description of security offerings, not a risk.

items.text: Cisco enables enterprises and service providers to deliver highly secure connectivity from workplaces to data centers worldwide.
items.rationale: Describes company capability, not a risk.

items.text: Our strength lies in our ability to deliver unified architecture with integrated, end-to-end solutions to help simplify complex challenges.
items.rationale: Marketing language about unified architecture.

items.text: These capabilities are accelerated with Cisco AI, enhancing outcomes for customers globally.
items.rationale: Promotional statement about AI-enhanced capabilities.

items.text: By integrating these capabilities across our networking portfolio, we aim to deliver continuous value to our customers through enhanced flexibility, scalability, and operational efficiency.
items.rationale: Strategic goal statement, no risk described.

items.text: This unified approach positions us to address the diverse needs of businesses as they transition to hybrid and cloud-first environments.
items.rationale: Describes positioning for hybrid/cloud transition, no risk.

items.text: Our switching portfolio now also includes the newly launched Cisco Smart Switches — Cisco 9350 and Cisco 9610— which represent the next generation of enterprise networking.
items.rationale: New product announcement, descriptive not risk-related.

items.text: These switches are AI-ready with advanced telemetry and assurance capabilities.
items.rationale: Product feature description.

items.text: They are built on Cisco Silicon One (which is our single, unified, and scalable networking silicon architecture) and are equipped with quantum-resistant security and post-quantum cryptography to protect against future threats.
items.rationale: Technical product description including security features, not a risk statement.

items.text: They also offer flexibility for one hardware to be managed via either the Cisco Catalyst Center or Meraki Dashboard user interface.
items.rationale: Product flexibility description.

items.text: During fiscal 2025, we introduced the Cisco N9300 Series Smart Switches with a new class of intelligent networking silicon alongside embedded Data Processing Units (DPUs), representing our new vision for AI data center designs.
items.rationale: New product introduction description, no risk.

items.text: Complex data processing tasks can be offloaded to the DPUs on the switch to improve both network architecture and the security posture.
items.rationale: Technical capability description.

items.text: Cisco Hypershield, our cloud-native and AI-powered approach to highly distributed security for AI-scale data centers that is built into the fabric of the network, is the first service offering available embedded on these new switches.
items.rationale: Product description of Hypershield security offering.

items.text: This helps to narrow the gap between security and networking layers by converging them into a single solution.
items.rationale: Describes product integration benefit, no risk.

items.text: Our routed optical networking systems and our pluggable optic solutions allow us to transform the economics of building and operating networks for our service provider customers.
items.rationale: Product description of optical networking systems.

items.text: With a product portfolio that includes both on-premises and cloud-managed wireless access points and controllers, we provide customers with a powerful and intuitive converged access solution when paired with our switching portfolio.
items.rationale: Product description of wireless solutions.

items.text: Security Security is at the core of our business strategy, reflecting our commitment to addressing the evolving needs of organizations of every size across industries.
items.rationale: Generic statement about security being core to strategy, no specific risk.

items.text: We are dedicated to continuous innovation, with significant investments in cloud-based security, AI-driven threat detection, and end-to-end security architectures designed to help customers proactively safeguard their most critical assets.
items.rationale: Describes investment areas, promotional not risk-related.

items.text: In the third quarter of fiscal 2024, we acquired Splunk, a recognized leader in security analytics and observability.
items.rationale: Factual statement about Splunk acquisition, descriptive not risk.

items.text: The Splunk platform and security offerings significantly strengthen our TIDR capabilities.
items.rationale: Describes strengthened capabilities from acquisition, no risk.

items.text: Our security offerings also include Cisco Hypershield, our cloud-native, AI-powered approach to highly distributed security for AI-scale data centers that is built into the fabric of the network.
items.rationale: Product description of Hypershield security offering.

items.text: Our security strategy positions us well to capture growing market demand for comprehensive, scalable, and integrated security solutions.
items.rationale: Promotional statement about market positioning, no risk described.
